_note: Fabricated Intercom-shaped export for the feedback-to-roadmap example. All names/emails are placeholders.

conversations.body: When I click 'Try a demo project' nothing happens for like 8 seconds. I thought it was broken.
Demo project loads but the share button does nothing. No error, no loading state.
Loved the new demo flow! Got me from 'huh' to 'oh I see' in like a minute. Thanks.
I want to invite my whole team at once. Right now I have to invite people one by one which is painful for 12 people.
Bulk invite would be amazing. CSV upload?
Demo share button still broken on Firefox. Works in Chrome.
Where do I change my billing email? I can't find it anywhere in settings.
Can paalto integrate with Jira? We're a Jira shop and Linear isn't on the table.
+1 on Jira. We'd switch off our current tool tomorrow if you had Jira parity.
Jira integration request — we have 4 squads on Jira, no plans to migrate to Linear.
I keep losing my place in the demo. There's no breadcrumb or 'back to dashboard' link. I had to use the browser back button.
Where's the back button in the demo? Genuine question. I clicked around for 2 minutes.
Demo share button doesn't work for me either. Safari. iPhone.
Pricing page seems to be down? Getting a 500.
